Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{wiktionary|Taishi|taishi}}
'''Taishi''' may refer to: {{tocright}} ==Names== *[[Taishi (surname)]], Chinese family name *[[Taishi (given name)]], Japanese given name
==Ranks== *[[Grand Preceptor]], ancient Chinese top civilian position: ''taishi'' ({{zh|s=太师|labels=no|link=no}}) in Chinese *Taishi, an alternate name of the Japanese [[Daijō-daijin]] *[[Taishi (Mongol title)]], a rank of Mongolian nobility
==Places== *[[Taishi Town]] (太石镇), town in [[Lintao County]], Gansu, China *[[Taishi Township]] (太石乡), township in [[Kang County]], Gansu, China *[[Taishi, Guangzhou]], village in Guangdong, China *[[Taishi, Hyōgo]], town in Hyōgo, Japan *[[Taishi, Osaka]], town in Osaka, Japan *[[Taisi, Yunlin]], also known as Taishi, township in Yunlin County, Taiwan
==Historical eras== *Taishi (太始, 96BC–93BC), an era name used by [[Emperor Wu of Han]] *Taishi (泰始, 265–274), an era name used by [[Emperor Wu of Jin]] *Taishi (泰始, 465–471), an era name used by [[Emperor Ming of Liu Song]] *Taishi (太始, 551–552), an era name used by [[Hou Jing]] *Taishi (太始, 818), or Taesi, an era name used by [[Gan of Balhae]]
{{disambiguation|geo}}
[[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]]

revision.text:
{{wiktionary|Taishi|taishi}}
'''Taishi''' may refer to: {{tocright}} ==Names== *[[Taishi (surname)]], Chinese family name *[[Taishi (given name)]], Japanese given name
==Ranks== *[[Grand Preceptor]], ancient Chinese top civilian position: ''taishi'' ({{zh|s=太师|labels=no|link=no}}) in Chinese *Taishi, an alternate name of the Japanese [[Daijō-daijin]] *[[Taishi (Mongol title)]], a rank of Mongolian nobility
==Places== *[[Taishi Town]] (太石镇), town in [[Lintao County]], Gansu, China *[[Taishi Township]] (太石乡), township in [[Kang County]], Gansu, China *[[Taishi, Guangzhou]], village in Guangdong, China *[[Taishi, Hyōgo]], town in Hyōgo, Japan *[[Taishi, Osaka]], town in Osaka, Japan *[[Taisi, Yunlin]], also known as Taishi, township in Yunlin County, Taiwan
==Historical eras== *Taishi (太始, 96BC–93BC), an era name used by [[Emperor Wu of Han]] *Taishi (泰始, 265–274), an era name used by [[Emperor Wu of Jin]] *Taishi (泰始, 465–471), an era name used by [[Emperor Ming of Liu Song]] *Taishi (太始, 551–552), an era name used by [[Hou Jing]] *Taishi (太始, 818), or Taesi, an era name used by [[Gan of Balhae]]
{{disambiguation|geo}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[de:Taishi]][[en:Taishi]][[fr:Taishi]][[pl:Taishi]][[pt:Taishi]][[ru:Тайси]][[sh:Taishi]][[sv:Taishi]] {{wiktionary|Taishi|taishi}}
'''Taishi''' may refer to: {{tocright}} ==Names== *[[:en:Taishi (surname)|Taishi (surname)]], Chinese family name *[[:en:Taishi (given name)|Taishi (given name)]], Japanese given name
==Ranks== *[[:en:Grand Preceptor|Grand Preceptor]], ancient Chinese top civilian position: ''taishi'' ({{zh|s=太师|labels=no|link=no}}) in Chinese *Taishi, an alternate name of the Japanese [[:en:Daijō-daijin|Daijō-daijin]] *[[:en:Taishi (Mongol title)|Taishi (Mongol title)]], a Rank of Mongolian nobility
==Places== *[[Taishi Town]] (太石镇), town in [[:en:Lintao County|Lintao County]], Gansu, China *[[Taishi Township]] (太石乡), township in [[:en:Kang County|Kang County]], Gansu, China *[[:en:Taishi, Guangzhou|Taishi, Guangzhou]], village in Guangdong, China *[[:en:Taishi, Hyōgo|Taishi, Hyōgo]], town in Hyōgo, Japan *[[:en:Taishi, Osaka|Taishi, Osaka]], town in Osaka, Japan *[[:en:Taisi, Yunlin|Taisi, Yunlin]], also known as Taishi, township in Yunlin County, Taiwan
==Historical eras== *Taishi (太始, 96BC–93BC), an era name used by [[:en:Emperor Wu of Han|Emperor Wu of Han]] *Taishi (泰始, 265–274), an era name used by [[:en:Emperor Wu of Jin|Emperor Wu of Jin]] *Taishi (泰始, 465–471), an era name used by [[:en:Emperor Ming of Liu Song|Emperor Ming of Liu Song]] *Taishi (太始, 551–552), an era name used by [[:en:Hou Jing|Hou Jing]] *Taishi (太始, 818), or Taesi, an era name used by [[:en:Gan of Balhae|Gan of Balhae]]
{{disambiguation|geo}}

==Places== *[[Taishi Town]] (太石镇), town in {{ill|Lintao County|en|Lintao County|WD=Q632997|lt=Lintao County|1=Lintao County}}, Gansu, China *[[Taishi Township]] (太石乡), township in {{ill|Kang County|en|Kang County|WD=Q1201613|lt=Kang County|1=Kang County}}, Gansu, China *{{ill|Taishi, Guangzhou|en|Taishi, Guangzhou|WD=Q7676412|lt=Taishi, Guangzhou|1=Taishi, Guangzhou}}, village in Guangdong, China *{{ill|Taishi, Hyōgo|en|Taishi, Hyōgo|WD=Q1155186|lt=Taishi, Hyōgo|1=Taishi, Hyōgo}}, town in Hyōgo, Japan *{{ill|Taishi, Osaka|en|Taishi, Osaka|WD=Q1347173|lt=Taishi, Osaka|1=Taishi, Osaka}}, town in Osaka, Japan *[[:en:Taisi, Yunlin|Taisi, Yunlin]], also known as Taishi, township in Yunlin County, Taiwan
